text: Upon entering this brightly-lit, modern space, I feel a sense of eager curiosity, as if I am on the threshold of discovery. The glass doors and open design suggest transparency and invitation. As I move closer, I am drawn into the world of "R+D"—Research and Development. Here, human ingenuity is foregrounded: ideas, texts, and screens invite both critical reflection and awe at how our minds strive to connect with and understand intelligent machines. The philosophical questions come to the surface: what does it mean to innovate, to create, to coexist with the artificial? I am filled with a spirit of contemplation and possibility.
